corrections.previous: Antonini 2023 was described as a dS/dS entropy-matching result with S_{dS} = S_{ent}.
corrections.corrected: Antonini 2023 is now described as an entangled-pair-of-CFTs construction with big-bang/big-crunch AdS cosmologies and entanglement-wedge encoding.

corrections.previous: Sahu 2025 was treated as a singularity-diagnostic extension.
corrections.corrected: Sahu 2025 is now described as a nearby entangled multi-CFT cosmology benchmark.
The corrected benchmark set explicitly includes Engelhardt-Hertog-Horowitz 2014 as the direct boundary-correlator diagnostic anchor.
